programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.sub-title: Inside North Korea's Secret Remote IT Workforce
programme.desc: How an Arizona woman’s house became a gateway for North Korea’s IT operatives, an underground laptop farm that infiltrated US companies and pumped millions to the regime.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer
programme.sub-title: How Flying Cars Became a Billion-Dollar Bet
programme.desc: The idea of flying cars has largely remained science fiction, until now; a new generation of electrified aircraft is attracting the attention of investors and venture capitalists around the world.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer
programme.sub-title: Is the Moon the Future of the Space Economy?
programme.desc: Governments and entrepreneurs race to commercialize the moon; the efforts could unlock a new, deep-space economy, but to return and stay requires the highest levels of innovation.

programme.title: LEADERS With Francine Lacqua
programme.sub-title: The Podcast: Wael Sawan on Leading Shell: Control What You Can Amid Global Uncertainty
programme.desc: The anchor sits down with the decision-makers shaping our future to explore the personal stories behind their public personas.

programme.title: Posthuman
programme.sub-title: Conquering the Miracle of Life
programme.desc: From birth to death, tech is stretching the boundaries of biology; exploring the discoveries that could transform reproduction, healthcare and how humans die.

programme.title: The Mishal Husain Show
programme.desc: Make sense of the world with one essential conversation every weekend; Mishal Husain, one of Britain's best interviewers, brings her signature blend of curiosity and tenacity to weekly conversations with world leaders, business titans and cultural icons, revealing who they really are and how they see the world changing around them.

programme.title: The Mishal Husain Show
programme.desc: Make sense of the world with one essential conversation every weekend; Mishal Husain, one of Britain's best interviewers, brings her signature blend of curiosity and tenacity to weekly conversations with world leaders, business titans and cultural icons, revealing who they really are and how they see the world changing around them.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.sub-title: MACC
programme.desc: The Malaysian Anti-Corruption Commission is supposed to root out graft. Instead, some of its members have been accused of perpetuating the very wrongdoing they were meant to stop.

programme.title: Bloomberg New Economy
programme.sub-title: Thriving in an Age of Extremes
programme.desc: Candid conversations with CEOs, investors, and government leaders focused on how to navigate and prosper in this age of economic uncertainty. Hosted by Erik Schatzker in Singapore.

programme.title: Businessweek Convenes: Black Leaders Face the DEI Backlash
programme.desc: Bloomberg Businessweek hosts an exclusive roundtable with Black business leaders like Ursula Burns and Lisa Wardell to discuss the impact of DEI rollbacks across corporate America.

programme.title: Bloomberg Originals
programme.desc: "Bloomberg Originals" offers bold takes for curious minds on today's biggest topics; hosted by experts covering stories you haven't seen and viewpoints you haven't heard, you'll discover cinematic, data-led shows that investigate the intersection of business and culture; exploring every angle of climate change, technology, finance, sports and beyond, "Bloomberg Originals" is business as you've never seen it.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer
programme.sub-title: How Flying Cars Became a Billion-Dollar Bet
programme.desc: The idea of flying cars has largely remained science fiction, until now; a new generation of electrified aircraft is attracting the attention of investors and venture capitalists around the world.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer
programme.sub-title: Is the Moon the Future of the Space Economy?
programme.desc: Governments and entrepreneurs race to commercialize the moon; the efforts could unlock a new, deep-space economy, but to return and stay requires the highest levels of innovation.

programme.title: The Circuit
programme.desc: Emily Chang meets Snap CEO Evan Spiegel in Los Angeles for a conversation about his entrepreneurial journey, building Snap and his latest consumer hardware bet; Spiegel is doubling down on smart glasses and going head-to-head with giants like Google.

programme.title: Bloomberg Investigates
programme.sub-title: Inside North Korea's Secret Remote IT Workforce
programme.desc: How an Arizona woman’s house became a gateway for North Korea’s IT operatives, an underground laptop farm that infiltrated US companies and pumped millions to the regime.

programme.title: Bloomberg Originals
programme.desc: "Bloomberg Originals" offers bold takes for curious minds on today's biggest topics; hosted by experts covering stories you haven't seen and viewpoints you haven't heard, you'll discover cinematic, data-led shows that investigate the intersection of business and culture; exploring every angle of climate change, technology, finance, sports and beyond, "Bloomberg Originals" is business as you've never seen it.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer
programme.sub-title: Why Money Is Flowing Into Geoengineering
programme.desc: Scientists and entrepreneurs are testing radical ideas like solar radiation management and ocean fertilization; they are finding funding for them.

programme.title: The Deal With Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly
programme.sub-title: The CEO Behind Barstool Sports & Food52
programme.desc: Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly sit with Erika Ayers Badan, former chief executive of Barstool Sports and current CEO of Food52, to discuss navigating turnarounds and how setbacks can fuel growth.

programme.title: Best of Bloomberg Invest 2026
programme.desc: A recap of Bloomberg Invest New York, featuring interviews with leaders in asset management, banking, private capital and wealth.

programme.title: The Mishal Husain Show
programme.desc: Make sense of the world with one essential conversation every weekend; Mishal Husain, one of Britain's best interviewers, brings her signature blend of curiosity and tenacity to weekly conversations with world leaders, business titans and cultural icons, revealing who they really are and how they see the world changing around them.

programme.title: LEADERS With Francine Lacqua
programme.sub-title: The Podcast: Wael Sawan on Leading Shell: Control What You Can Amid Global Uncertainty
programme.desc: The anchor sits down with the decision-makers shaping our future to explore the personal stories behind their public personas.

programme.title: Bloomberg New Economy
programme.sub-title: Thriving in an Age of Extremes
programme.desc: Candid conversations with CEOs, investors, and government leaders focused on how to navigate and prosper in this age of economic uncertainty. Hosted by Erik Schatzker in Singapore.

programme.title: Bloomberg Wall Street Week
programme.desc: A weekly program telling the stories of capitalism from around the world, David Westin in New York hosts.

programme.title: Businessweek Convenes: Black Leaders Face the DEI Backlash
programme.desc: Bloomberg Businessweek hosts an exclusive roundtable with Black business leaders like Ursula Burns and Lisa Wardell to discuss the impact of DEI rollbacks across corporate America.

programme.title: Bloomberg Wall Street Week
programme.desc: A weekly program telling the stories of capitalism from around the world, David Westin in New York hosts.

programme.title: Bloomberg This Weekend
programme.desc: The news doesn't stop when markets close; hosts David Gura, Christina Ruffini and Lisa Mateo bring clarity, context and a bit of humor to the weekend's biggest headlines, LIVE from New York.

programme.title: The Mishal Husain Show
programme.desc: Make sense of the world with one essential conversation every weekend; Mishal Husain, one of Britain's best interviewers, brings her signature blend of curiosity and tenacity to weekly conversations with world leaders, business titans and cultural icons, revealing who they really are and how they see the world changing around them.

programme.title: The David Rubenstein Show: Peer to Peer Conversations
programme.desc: Maria Sharapova, Former No. 1 World Tennis Player.

programme.sub-title: Inside North Korea's Secret Remote IT Workforce
programme.desc: How an Arizona woman’s house became a gateway for North Korea’s IT operatives, an underground laptop farm that infiltrated US companies and pumped millions to the regime.

programme.sub-title: The Podcast: Wael Sawan on Leading Shell: Control What You Can Amid Global Uncertainty
programme.desc: The anchor sits down with the decision-makers shaping our future to explore the personal stories behind their public personas.

programme.title: The Mishal Husain Show
programme.desc: Make sense of the world with one essential conversation every weekend; Mishal Husain, one of Britain's best interviewers, brings her signature blend of curiosity and tenacity to weekly conversations with world leaders, business titans and cultural icons, revealing who they really are and how they see the world changing around them.

programme.title: The Mishal Husain Show
programme.desc: Make sense of the world with one essential conversation every weekend; Mishal Husain, one of Britain's best interviewers, brings her signature blend of curiosity and tenacity to weekly conversations with world leaders, business titans and cultural icons, revealing who they really are and how they see the world changing around them.

programme.title: Bloomberg Chief Future Officer
programme.sub-title: Gina Goetter, Hasbro
programme.desc: Gina Goetter is the CFO and COO of Hasbro; she's the architect of the company's transformation, while diversifying its manufacturing footprint and investing in Hasbro's video game ambitions.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer
programme.sub-title: Is the Moon the Future of the Space Economy?
programme.desc: Governments and entrepreneurs race to commercialize the moon; the efforts could unlock a new, deep-space economy, but to return and stay requires the highest levels of innovation.

programme.title: Bloomberg Originals
programme.desc: "Bloomberg Originals" offers bold takes for curious minds on today's biggest topics; hosted by experts covering stories you haven't seen and viewpoints you haven't heard, you'll discover cinematic, data-led shows that investigate the intersection of business and culture; exploring every angle of climate change, technology, finance, sports and beyond, "Bloomberg Originals" is business as you've never seen it.

programme.title: Bloomberg Wall Street Week
programme.desc: A weekly program telling the stories of capitalism from around the world, David Westin in New York hosts.

programme.title: Bloomberg The Asia Trade
programme.desc: Bringing global investors everything you need to know as the trading day begins in Asia; Bloomberg TV is live from Tokyo and Sydney with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud-Watts, getting insight and analysis from newsmakers and industry leaders on the biggest stories shaping markets, from tech, to geopolitics, and the world's energy transition.
